title: Galaxy Lords
overview: A mere decade after the Heptigalaxial Cosmic Eternity War, the Kingdom of the Seven Galaxies is once again on the precipice of oblivion. The evil Zargantian prince Adorastius has escaped his icy incarceration and threatens all known existence with the most fantastical yet calamitous power imaginable.
